name: Gemini RAG
text: **The 48-Hour Safety Net:** If you have simply "lost track" of the files, remember that **Google automatically purges them after 48 hours.** If you are not in a rush to free up space, simply waiting 2 days will perform the cleanup for you.

name: OpenAI RAG
text:
Does OpenAI (gpt...) have an API to upload document(s) to use in a simple RAG operation?

I've implemented Google's gemini File RAG which works nicely. I currently have working code for OpenAI's straight-language-only conversational API.

name: DeskCMD
text:
Environment: Linux

I want to build a DeskCMD.deb file for my applicatioin for convenient deployment and installations.

The application deskcmd is writen in C. It has one executable: deskcmd
It uses no files in the app root directory.
It does use files that get created in USER/.config

Also it would be nice to execute a bash script during the installation if possible.
